Interface ISwathFunctionArguments

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control swath function arguments.

[Guid("A4F356C3-AC77-410C-B9BB-BA49EABC0B4B")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ISwathFunctionArguments

Properties

InterpolationMethod

The interpolation method.

esriInterpolateIrregularDataMethod InterpolationMethod { get; set; }

Property Value

esriInterpolateIrregularDataMethod

Raster

The input Raster.

object Raster { get; set; }

object

RasterInfo

The raster definition containing at least extent, cellsize, and pixel type.
